_note: GLM5 c=64 held-out eval window. gorgo-static deploys hillclimb-learned params from c=64 tuning v8 (prefill_weight=0.0601, load_weight=0.00402, rtt_weight=4132). Pair with manifest_glm5_apr2_0030_0100.json (same time-of-day as tuning, different day -- tests generalization).
